_comment: Source of truth for per-page social-share images. Each entry renders assets/og/card.html to images/og/<slug>.png at 1200x630. To add a page: add an entry here, run `npm run build:og-cards`, then point that page's og:image + twitter:image at https://shevato.com/images/og/<slug>.png.

cards.title: Arena
cards.subtitle: Real-time multiplayer party games with friends

cards.title: Football H2H
cards.subtitle: Head-to-head match tracker with full stats and shootouts

cards.title: Gym Tracker
cards.subtitle: Log workouts, track strength and body progress. Free PWA.

cards.title: Mario Kart Tracker
cards.subtitle: Track MK8 Deluxe and Mario Kart World races and stats

cards.title: Rising Seasons
cards.subtitle: Discover TV by the shape of its episode ratings
